prompt: There's a bug in my Express.js API — the /users/:id endpoint returns 200 with an empty body instead of 404 when the user doesn't exist. I need this fixed properly with tests.

assertions.text: Phase 1 scoped spec to bug fix, not a new feature (narrow scope, no feature creep)
Failing test written to reproduce the bug BEFORE the fix is implemented
Acceptance criterion tied to test passing (not just 'looks right')
